## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential engagement for Marcel Santilli's AI-powered content creation and SEO services for Can Ozdoruk's new company Firework.](https://fathom.video/share/hgzK8AaPKAKPP8Q4aRjbJyK5uuyfKN9D?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel outlined his AI-driven approach to creating high-quality content at scale for SEO, including using AI workflows, human review, and dedicated resources](https://fathom.video/share/hgzK8AaPKAKPP8Q4aRjbJyK5uuyfKN9D?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Can expressed interest in ramping up to 3 blog posts/day within 6 weeks to drive organic traffic and thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/hgzK8AaPKAKPP8Q4aRjbJyK5uuyfKN9D?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [Marcel will provide a proposed roadmap and introduction to existing clients for reference](https://fathom.video/share/hgzK8AaPKAKPP8Q4aRjbJyK5uuyfKN9D?tab=summary&timestamp=1758.0)
  - [Can will introduce Marcel to his partner for additional feedback before moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/hgzK8AaPKAKPP8Q4aRjbJyK5uuyfKN9D?tab=summary&timestamp=1803.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's AI Content Creation Approach

  - [Uses AI + automation + human review to create high-quality content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/hgzK8AaPKAKPP8Q4aRjbJyK5uuyfKN9D?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [Built automated workflows to research, write, optimize content for target keywords](https://fathom.video/share/hgzK8AaPKAKPP8Q4aRjbJyK5uuyfKN9D?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Hires and trains dedicated offshore resources for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/hgzK8AaPKAKPP8Q4aRjbJyK5uuyfKN9D?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [Currently ranking for 200k+ keywords across clients](https://fathom.video/share/hgzK8AaPKAKPP8Q4aRjbJyK5uuyfKN9D?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
  - [Allows planting many "content seeds" then enriching top performers](https://fathom.video/share/hgzK8AaPKAKPP8Q4aRjbJyK5uuyfKN9D?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)

### Potential Engagement for Firework

  - [Initial 6 weeks: Kickoff, research, building out workflows and processes](https://fathom.video/share/hgzK8AaPKAKPP8Q4aRjbJyK5uuyfKN9D?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Ramp up to 3 blog posts per day over 6 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/hgzK8AaPKAKPP8Q4aRjbJyK5uuyfKN9D?tab=summary&timestamp=899.0)
  - [Incorporate multimedia/videos aligning with Firework's product](https://fathom.video/share/hgzK8AaPKAKPP8Q4aRjbJyK5uuyfKN9D?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
  - [Can to provide guidance on target customers, keywords, verticals](https://fathom.video/share/hgzK8AaPKAKPP8Q4aRjbJyK5uuyfKN9D?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [Dedicated resource to align with Can's team](https://fathom.video/share/hgzK8AaPKAKPP8Q4aRjbJyK5uuyfKN9D?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)

### Quality Assurance

  - [Depends on Firework's preferences - from light human review to higher bars](https://fathom.video/share/hgzK8AaPKAKPP8Q4aRjbJyK5uuyfKN9D?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
  - [Can prefers starting light then increasing review as volume ramps up](https://fathom.video/share/hgzK8AaPKAKPP8Q4aRjbJyK5uuyfKN9D?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
  - [Can to meet and approve the dedicated resource working on their content](https://fathom.video/share/hgzK8AaPKAKPP8Q4aRjbJyK5uuyfKN9D?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)

### Next Steps

  - [Marcel to provide a proposed 5-month roadmap/plan by early next week](https://fathom.video/share/hgzK8AaPKAKPP8Q4aRjbJyK5uuyfKN9D?tab=summary&timestamp=1795.0)
  - [Marcel to introduce Can to an existing client for reference](https://fathom.video/share/hgzK8AaPKAKPP8Q4aRjbJyK5uuyfKN9D?tab=summary&timestamp=1758.0)
  - [Can to introduce Marcel to his partner for additional feedback](https://fathom.video/share/hgzK8AaPKAKPP8Q4aRjbJyK5uuyfKN9D?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
  - [Discuss further after Can reviews proposal and client reference](https://fathom.video/share/hgzK8AaPKAKPP8Q4aRjbJyK5uuyfKN9D?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)
